name: The Weststar Group
description: Malaysian conglomerate with defence industry arm (Weststar Defence Industries). Engaged in aerospace and defence manufacturing, strategic international partnerships.
leadership: Tan Sri Dr. Syed Azman Syed Ibrahim (Executive Chairman)
key_events: Signed Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Rocket Technologies International (RTI) at National Convention Centre, Canberra (July 2026)
Participated in Malaysia Aerospace & Defence Industry Mission to Australia (July 2026)
